name: sql-guard
description: Validate AI-generated PostgreSQL queries against explicit table allowlists

scripts.pack:check: npm_config_cache=.npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --json | node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const output=fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const result=JSON.parse(output)[0]; const limit=500000; if (result.unpackedSize > limit) { console.error('Package unpacked size ' + result.unpackedSize + ' exceeds limit ' + limit); process.exit(1); } console.log('Package unpacked size ' + result.unpackedSize + ' bytes (limit ' + limit + ')');"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build

author: Nur Zaman
